name: com.caseyfarina.midifighter64
description: MIDI input bridge for the DJ Tech Tools Midi Fighter 64 grid controller. Converts raw MIDI note events into logical 8x8 grid coordinates and routes them as typed C# events. Built on the Unity Input System and Minis MIDI package.

samples.description: Generates an 8x8 grid of spheres representing Midi Fighter 64 buttons. Pressing buttons highlights the corresponding sphere. A UI button plays an animated LED wave across the hardware and the on-screen grid.
